mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.category, p.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, p.view_count, p.comment_count, p.is_top,
LEFT(p.content, 200) AS content,
NULL AS content,
DATE_FORMAT(p.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_time FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id
AND p.category = #{category}
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.is_top DESC, p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.category, p.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, p.view_count, p.comment_count, p.is_top, DATE_FORMAT(p.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_time FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id ORDER BY (p.view_count + p.comment_count * 10) DESC

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.category, p.user_id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.bloodline_grade, u.faction, u.yanling, p.view_count, p.comment_count, p.is_top, DATE_FORMAT(p.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_time, DATE_FORMAT(p.update_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS update_time FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.category, p.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, p.view_count, p.comment_count, p.is_top, DATE_FORMAT(p.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_time FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.is_top DESC, p.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
